rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM HANCOCK et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 15, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANT DAP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOTION DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED THAT HE WORKED WITH DEFENDANTS CAULKING AND ADHESIVES. DEFENDANT ADMITS SOME OF ITS CAULKING CONTAINED ASBESTOS. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION ADMISSIBLE. TREAT DECLARATION OBJECTIONS SUSTAINED AS TO PARAGRAPHS 5, 6, 12-16. FRAUD AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIMS WITHDRAWN. =(302/CWW/PB)
